label: offensive
rationale: 'economy fucks itself' - uses profanity to express political frustration.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Empty head' - personal insult aimed at an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'nitatingisa matiti' - sexual crudeness and vulgarity.

label: neither
rationale: 'that SHIT is useless' - harsh political criticism of a government policy (SHA/NHIF).

label: offensive
rationale: 'The knife that missed the artery won’t miss the heart' - veiled threat and personal abuse against an individual.

label: offensive
rationale: 'dozy mare' and 'What Thick Dick told me in bed' - personal insult and sexual crudeness.

label: offensive
rationale: 'utalia na kunyamba sana' - crude and vulgar abuse aimed at politicians.

label: neither
rationale: 'we ni mpumbavu wa mwisho' - robust criticism of Muslim protesters from a religious perspective, not collective hate against Muslims.

label: offensive
rationale: 'That tribal man is very evil' - personal attack on a politician, not transferred to his community.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kalonzo hana hata full support ya kambas' - ordinary ethnic-bloc electoral analysis.

label: neither
rationale: 'Advice Kambas to do the same' - political strategy talk regarding a voting bloc.

label: hate
rationale: 'vast majority of the Ol-Kalou people are not intelligent' and 'all Chokoras in their behaviours' - collective attribution of negative characteristics to a community.

label: hate
rationale: 'peleka ukisii Yako huko' - attacks a politician by weaponizing their ethnicity.

label: neither
rationale: 'The two moles in kenyas opposition' - ordinary political criticism.

label: hate
rationale: 'foreigners like Dwale, Hajji and Amin' - declaring citizens as foreigners based on their ethnic or religious background.

label: hate
rationale: 'hizo Mbwa za coast' - dehumanising a regional community by calling them dogs.

label: neither
rationale: 'MauMau did not die for Kenyans to become slaves' - political rhetoric without group-based hate.

label: neither
rationale: 'High Court rejects petition' - factual reporting of a court ruling.

label: neither
rationale: 'Only an idiots ndio they follow' and 'Opposition by birth' - harsh political criticism of a party's supporters.

label: neither
rationale: 'Are we going to see the death of an MP' - political speculation and criticism of the government.

label: neither
rationale: 'Israel is the most hated nation on earth' - robust political criticism of a foreign state and its policies.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kwa nini ni wakamba ndio wanapush' - tribal arithmetic and coalition talk.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Aende kwa matakataka' - insulting a politician by telling them to go to the trash.

label: offensive
rationale: 'kama matako ya gachagua' - crude vulgarity involving a politician's name.

label: neither
rationale: 'uyu ni dynasty nashuku ni mtoi wa kindiki' - ordinary political banter.
